## Profile summary

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Profile ID | |
| Target language / framework / domain | |
| Number of rules | |
| File patterns | e.g. `**/*.rs`, `**/*.go` |

## Why is this profile valuable?

What problems does it catch? Who is the target audience (embedded developers, web teams, security engineers, etc.)?

## Rule list

| Rule ID | Category | Severity | Summary |
|---|---|---|---|
| | | | |

## Profile YAML

Paste the full YAML below (or attach the file):

```yaml
profile:
  id: 
  label: ""
  ...
```

## Testing notes

- What codebase or example did you test this against?
- Did the AI correctly cite these rules in its output?
